offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate commission calculations cause payment delays. We automate commission payout reports instead of manual calculations using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate commission calculations lead to payment delays and disputes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers

Community forums for sharing tools and resources

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
